auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.maintenanceMessage: We are performing scheduled maintenance. Please check back later.

userSettings.title: Account Settings
userSettings.name: Name
userSettings.saveError: Could not save changes. Try again.

airportSelection.searchPlaceholder: Search airports by ICAO code, name, or city

dashboard.mapHelpClick: Click an object - view feature info
dashboard.mapHelpWasd: WASD or arrow keys - pan the map

map.noInspectionSelected: Select an inspection to edit waypoints

warningSuggestion.surfaceCrossing: adjust transit path to avoid surface crossing
warningSuggestion.cameraObstruction: adjust waypoint position or remove blocking obstacle
warningSuggestion.safetyZone: reroute path outside the restricted zone
warningSuggestion.battery: reduce mission distance or split into multiple flights
warningSuggestion.measurementDensity: increase measurement density override in inspection config
warningSuggestion.speed: reduce flight speed or increase measurement spacing
warningSuggestion.altitude: lower the inspection altitude or use a drone with higher ceiling
warningSuggestion.obstacle: raise waypoint altitude above obstacle clearance
warningSuggestion.defaultOverride: set an explicit override in the inspection configuration

map.warningGlobalWarning: This warning affects the entire trajectory
map.useTakeoffAsLandingHint: Landing will match the takeoff point
map.deleteConfirm: Delete {{type}} point? The trajectory will be invalidated.

coordinates.latHelp: Latitude in decimal degrees (-90 to 90). Positive values are north of the equator, negative south.
coordinates.lonHelp: Longitude in decimal degrees (-180 to 180). Positive values are east of the prime meridian, negative west.
coordinates.altHelp: Altitude above mean sea level in metres. For airport features this defaults to the airport elevation.

tools.heading: Measure heading between two points (H)
tools.zoom: Left click zoom in, right click zoom out (Z)
tools.3d: Perspective view - middle mouse to tilt

map.editingIn2dOnly: Editing is only available in 2D view

help.title: Controls Help
help.descSelect: Click features to inspect. Drag on empty space to pan.
help.descMove: Click features to inspect, drag waypoints to new positions. Drag on empty space to pan. In DRAFT, only takeoff/landing.
help.descMeasure: Click to place points. Distance updates live. Right-click to clear. Max 25 points.
help.descZoom: Left click zoom in, right click zoom out.
help.clickSelectDblLocate: Click to select. Double-click to recenter the map on the object.

overview.noFlightPlan: No data — Flight Plan needs to be generated

config.droneProfileHelp: Selects the airframe used for this mission. Drives endurance, max speed, max altitude, camera frame rate, and which export formats are available. Changing the drone regresses the mission to DRAFT.
config.transitSpeedOverrideHelp: Cruise speed used between waypoints (takeoff → first measurement, inspection-to-inspection, last measurement → landing). Leave empty to use 5.0 m/s.
config.missionMeasurementSpeedHelp: Speed used during measurement passes for every inspection unless an inspection sets its own override. Leave empty to inherit the per-template default.
config.missionMeasurementSpeedHint: Applies to all inspections unless overridden
config.defaultAltitudeOffsetHelp: Vertical bias added to every measurement waypoint across this mission. Use a positive value to fly higher than the template default, negative to fly lower.
config.defaultBufferDistanceHint: Leave empty to keep object-level values
config.defaultBufferDistanceHelp: Lateral safety buffer applied around obstacles and surfaces during measurement. Leave empty to keep each object's own buffer value.
config.transitAglHint: Minimum 5 m - leave empty for safe default
config.transitAglHelp: Height above ground used for cruise legs between waypoints. Minimum 5 m. Leave empty for the safe default. Changing this regresses the mission to DRAFT.
config.requirePerpendicularCrossingHint: On = route around runways when feasible; cross perpendicularly only when unavoidable. Off = shortest geodesic crossing, minimises runway closure window.
config.keepInsideAirportBoundaryHint: On = bias transits to stay inside the airport boundary polygon. Off = no penalty, planner picks the geodesic.
config.templateNameHelp: The inspection template this entry was created from. Defines the AGL system, method, and the default values shown below.
config.methodHelp: Inspection method assigned by the template (Horizontal Range, Vertical Profile, Hover Point Lock, Fly Over, Parallel Side Sweep, MEHT Check). Determines the geometry and where every other field applies.

lhaSelection.title: LHA Selection
lhaSelection.titleHelp: Pick which LHAs this inspection covers. The trajectory's centre point is the centroid of selected LHAs.
lhaSelection.rangeInvalid: From must be less than or equal to To
lhaSelection.fromThresholdUnavailable: From-threshold mode is not available - the parent surface has no threshold/end position.

config.altitudeOffsetHelp: Vertical bias added to every measurement waypoint of this inspection. Positive raises the pass; negative lowers it. Stacks on top of the mission-level offset.
config.measurementSpeedOverrideHint: Overrides mission measurement speed for this inspection
config.measurementSpeedOverrideHelp: Speed used during this inspection's measurement pass. Leave empty to inherit the mission-level value. Speeds above the camera frame-rate limit are flagged as warnings.
config.measurementDensityHelp: Number of waypoints sampled along the measurement pass. Higher values capture more data but lengthen the flight and battery use.
config.customTolerancesHelp: Per-template tolerance band (degrees) used by safety validation. Leave empty to use the angular tolerances inherited from the template.
config.hoverDurationHelp: Time the drone holds at each measurement waypoint before moving on. Longer hover gives sensors more time to settle but extends total flight time.
config.horizontalDistanceHelp: Distance from the LHA to the measurement pass. Sets the radius for Horizontal Range and the standoff for Vertical Profile. Default: 400 m.
config.sweepAngleHelp: Total angular width of the Horizontal Range arc, centred on the extended runway centerline. Default: 15° (±7.5° each side).
config.angleSourceHelp: Picks where the Vertical Profile climb band comes from. PAPI walks the camera around the LHA setting angle by the offsets below; Custom uses absolute climb-start and climb-end angles.
config.angleSourcePapiUnavailable: PAPI requires setting angles on LHA unit(s): {{units}}
config.angleStartHelp: Lowest elevation angle scanned at the bottom of the Vertical Profile climb. Custom mode only.
config.angleEndHelp: Highest elevation angle scanned at the top of the Vertical Profile climb. Must be greater than Climb Start.
config.angleOffsetAboveHelp: Degrees added above the LHA setting angle to set the top of the climb band in PAPI mode.
config.angleOffsetBelowHelp: Degrees subtracted below the LHA setting angle to set the bottom of the climb band in PAPI mode.
config.angleBandError: Climb start must be less than climb end
config.angleOffsetHelp: Adds to the LHA setting angle to derive the camera glide-slope used during the pass. Small values keep the camera near the actual approach beam.
config.computedObservationAngleHelp: Effective glide-slope angle used by the trajectory: highest LHA setting angle plus the angle offset. Read-only — adjust by changing setting-angle source or angle offset.
config.lhaSettingAngleOverrideHint: Select which LHA unit's setting angle to use for altitude calculation
config.lhaSettingAngleOverrideHelp: Picks which LHA's setting angle drives the observation angle. Auto uses the highest angle in the selection.
config.missingSettingAngleWarning: LHA unit(s) {{units}} missing setting angle - observation angle may be inaccurate
config.bufferDistanceOverrideHint: Leave empty to use mission-level value
config.bufferDistanceOverrideHelp: Lateral safety buffer applied around obstacles and surfaces for this inspection only. Larger values are safer; smaller ones improve sensor coverage. Leave empty to inherit the mission value.
config.speedFramerateWarning: Speed exceeds camera frame rate capability for the selected drone
config.unsavedChangesBody: You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you navigate away. Are you sure you want to discard them?
config.addDisabledNotDraft: Can only add inspections in DRAFT status
config.statusRegressed: Mission status changed to {{status}} due to configuration change
config.noInspectionSelected: Select an inspection to configure, or edit mission settings below
config.heading: Heading
config.selectWaypoint: Click a waypoint to see details
config.savePartialError: Some inspection changes could not be saved
config.allPapiSlotsUsed: All PAPI slots (A–D) are in use

captureMode.title: Capture Mode
captureMode.titleHelp: Capture mode for this inspection. Video records continuously across the pass; Photo triggers a shutter at every waypoint. Leave empty to inherit the mission default.
captureMode.defaultTitleHelp: Default capture mode for inspections. Video records continuously across each measurement pass; Photo triggers a shutter at every waypoint. Inspections may override this individually.
captureMode.recordingSetupDurationHelp: Pause inserted before each video pass so the recorder can spin up and stabilise. Default: 5 s. Increase if the camera misses the first frames.

config.pickingOnMap: Click on the map to set {{field}}
config.mehtHeightHint: Height above threshold at glide slope angle - adjustable via altitude offset
config.mehtHeightHelp: Computed minimum eye height over threshold at the glide-slope angle. Read-only; adjust by changing the altitude offset.
config.staleTrajectory: Trajectory is outdated - recompute to update
config.lhaSaveError: Failed to save LHA selection - re-select manually
config.setCoordinatesTooltip: Set takeoff and landing coordinates first

warningsPanel.title: Violations, Warnings & Suggestions
warningsPanel.noIssuesHint: All constraints satisfied for this trajectory.
warningsPanel.noTrajectory: Compute the trajectory to see warnings.

config.noTemplateForCombo: No template exists for this combination. Ask your Coordinator to create one.
config.heightAboveLightsHelp: Vertical clearance the drone keeps above the inspected lights during a fly-over or parallel-side-sweep pass. Default: 15 m.
config.descentStartDistanceHelp: How far back of the runway touchpoint the approach descent begins, measured along the runway centerline. Default: 1000 m.
config.descentGlideSlopeOverrideHint: Leave empty for the PAPI angle
config.descentGlideSlopeOverrideHelp: Custom glide slope angle for the approach descent. Leave empty to use the PAPI-derived nominal glide path (typically 3 deg).
config.heightAboveLhaHelp: Drone altitude above the LHA point during Hover Point Lock. With auto-aim on, changing this also updates the gimbal angle.
config.distanceFromLhaHelp: Horizontal distance from the drone to the LHA during Hover Point Lock. Default: 50 m for PAPI, 10 m for runway edge lights.
config.lateralOffsetHelp: Sideways distance the drone holds from the line of lights during a parallel-side-sweep pass. Default: 30 m.
config.cameraGimbalAngleHelp: Pitch of the camera relative to horizontal. -90° is straight down; 0° is level. With auto-aim on (Hover Point Lock), changing this also updates the height above the LHA.
config.scanSurfaceHelp: Runway or taxiway the drone sweeps. The serpentine pass is centered on this surface's centerline.
config.scanLengthModeHelp: How much of the surface to scan along its axis. Full covers the whole length; Max length caps the far end; Interval scans a window between two distances.
config.scanLengthAnchorHelp: Which end the length window is measured from. Threshold measures from the runway threshold (default); Endpoint measures from the far end.
config.scanWidthHelp: Cross-track band to scan. Leave empty for the full surface width; set a value to scan a narrower band on one side.
config.scanHeightHelp: Height above the surface the drone flies the scan. Default: 10 m.
config.scanGimbalHelp: Pitch of the forward-tilted camera. -90° is straight down; the default -70° tilts forward to image the pavement ahead.
config.scanRunOrientationHelp: Whether parallel runs follow the surface length (lengthwise) or cross it (widthwise).
config.scanRunCountHelp: Number of parallel runs. Leave empty to auto-compute from the camera footprint and sidelap.
config.scanSidelapHelp: Overlap between adjacent runs as a percent of the image footprint. Higher sidelap means more runs and fuller coverage. Default: 20%.
config.scanFrontlapHelp: Forward overlap between consecutive photos along each run, as a percent of the image footprint. Higher frontlap packs more capture points along the track. Default: 0%.
config.targetLhaHelp: Specific LHA the drone hovers in front of for Hover Point Lock. Pick the unit you want photographed; the bearing and distance fields are measured from this point.
config.targetAglHelp: AGL system that owns the target LHA for Hover Point Lock. Selecting an AGL filters the LHA dropdown below.
config.angleLockHint: On: editing any field recomputes the third so the camera always points at the LHA. Off: all three are independent.
config.angleLockHelp: When on, distance, height, and gimbal angle stay locked together so the camera always points at the LHA. Turn off to set each value independently.

direction.label: Direction
direction.labelHelp: Direction this inspection is flown. Inherit follows the mission default; Natural and Reversed pin the traversal regardless of the mission setting.
direction.inheritHint: Direction follows the mission default; solver picks when mission is Auto.

missionDirection.label: Default direction
missionDirection.hint: Auto = solver picks per inspection. Natural / Reversed pin all inspections that inherit.

modeTitle.auto: Solver picks direction per inspection to minimize total transit
modeTitle.natural: Pin inheriting inspections to natural direction
modeTitle.reversed: Pin inheriting inspections to reversed direction

config.hoverBearingHelp: Direction the drone sits relative to the LHA during Hover Point Lock. Switch the reference between runway-relative (0° = approach side) and absolute compass.
config.hoverBearingRunwayHelp: 0° = drone faces approach side (180° from runway heading). Positive values rotate clockwise around the LHA.
config.hoverBearingCompassHelp: Absolute compass heading from LHA to drone. 0° = N, 90° = E, 180° = S, 270° = W.

cameraSettings.title: Camera Settings
cameraSettings.titleHelp: How the camera is configured during this inspection. Inherit uses mission defaults; Auto lets the drone manage settings; Manual exposes white balance, ISO, shutter, focus, and zoom for hand-tuning.
cameraSettings.whiteBalanceHelp: Color-temperature reference for the camera. Pick the option closest to the actual lighting at the time of flight; auto-WB can drift between waypoints under cloud cover.
cameraSettings.isoHelp: Sensor sensitivity. Lower ISO means cleaner image but needs more light; higher ISO is brighter but noisier. Inspections inherit this unless they override.
cameraSettings.shutterSpeedHelp: Camera exposure time. Faster shutter freezes motion across measurement passes; slower shutter brightens the image but risks blur at cruise speed.
cameraSettings.focusModeHelp: Auto refocuses each waypoint; Infinite locks the lens for distant subjects (typical for runway-light inspections) and avoids hunting between waypoints.
cameraSettings.opticalZoomHelp: Camera zoom level applied at every measurement waypoint. Values above the drone's optical limit fall back to digital zoom and lose image quality.
cameraSettings.gimbalAngleHelp: Pitch of the camera relative to horizontal. -90° is straight down; 0° is level with the horizon. Used when an inspection does not target a specific LHA.
cameraSettings.zoomOverOpticalWarning: Zoom exceeds drone's optical limit ({{max}}x); values above use digital zoom and lose image quality.
cameraSettings.presetLabelHelp: Applies a saved bundle of white balance, ISO, shutter speed, and focus mode to all inspections. Switching preset overwrites the manual fields below.

flightPlanScope.fullDescription: Starts and ends at transit altitude above takeoff/landing points
flightPlanScope.measurementsOnlyDescription: Mission starts at first measurement and ends at last; transits between inspections are still planned
flightPlanScope.airborneStartNote: The drone must already be airborne before this mission starts. Hand-launch and fly the drone up, then start the mission. This scope has no takeoff or landing.

sections.cameraSettingsHelp: Default camera configuration that inspections inherit. Auto lets the drone manage settings; Manual exposes white balance, ISO, shutter speed, and focus mode that every inspection without its own override uses.
sections.missionTogglesHelp: Mission-wide flight toggles. Use Takeoff as Landing locks the landing point to the takeoff coordinate; Avoid Runway Crossings prefers go-around routes and falls back to a perpendicular crossing only when no detour is feasible.
sections.coordinatesHelp: Takeoff and landing points used by the flight plan. The drone arms here, climbs to transit altitude, then descends back at the end of the mission.
sections.flightPlanScopeHelp: Which segments to include when compiling the flight plan. The drone must be hand-launched and airborne before the mission starts; full climbs to transit altitude before the first measurement and back down at the end (no ground takeoff or landing in the wayline), measurements-only drops the bookend transits and starts at the first measurement.
sections.directionHelp: Default traversal direction inspections inherit. Auto lets the solver pick per inspection to minimize transit; Natural and Reversed pin every inheriting inspection.
sections.notesHelp: Free-form notes saved with the mission. Visible to operators and coordinators when they review or hand off the mission later.

validationExportPage.noData: No data - Flight Plan needs to be generated
validationExportPage.formatKmzDesc: DJI WPMZ archive for Pilot 2 and Flight Hub 2
validationExportPage.formatWpmlDesc: DJI waypoint mission format for Matrice and Mavic series
validationExportPage.formatCsvDesc: Comma-separated values with waypoint coordinates and actions
validationExportPage.formatGpxDesc: GPS Exchange Format for handheld GPS and GIS software
validationExportPage.formatLitchiDesc: Litchi Mission Hub import format for DJI consumer drones
validationExportPage.needsValidation: Mission needs to be validated before export
validationExportPage.exportDisabledTerminal: Export not available in this status
validationExportPage.completeTooltip: Mission must be exported before it can be completed
validationExportPage.cancelTooltip: Mission must be exported before it can be cancelled
validationExportPage.completeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to mark this mission as completed? This action cannot be undone.
validationExportPage.cancelConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to cancel this mission? This action cannot be undone.
validationExportPage.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this mission? This action cannot be undone.

wpmlFallback.title: Export with fallback drone enum?
wpmlFallback.bodyUnmappedDji: {{drone}} isn't in DJI's published WPML 1.0.6 enum table. The file will be tagged as a Matrice 4T as a fallback — the aircraft firmware reads the WPML actions directly, so the mission still flies correctly, but the DJI Fly preview may show the wrong aircraft icon.
wpmlFallback.bodyNonDji: KMZ/WPML is a DJI-proprietary format. {{drone}} cannot read this file directly. The file will still be generated (tagged as a Matrice 4T fallback) for archival or conversion — consider exporting to LITCHI or KML instead.
wpmlFallback.bodyNoDrone: No drone is configured for this mission. The KMZ will be tagged as a Matrice 4T fallback. Assign a drone before flight.

altitudeClamp.title: Altitude clamps applied
altitudeClamp.body: {{count}} waypoint(s) sit below the takeoff reference and were clamped to ground level in the DJI export. The flight will follow the clamped altitudes, not the values you entered.
altitudeClamp.acknowledge: I understand the affected waypoints will fly at the clamped altitude.

validationExportPage.deleteBlocked: Cannot delete mission in this status

scopeInfo.full: Export starts/ends at transit altitude - no ground-level takeoff or landing
scopeInfo.measurementsOnly: Export starts at first measurement and ends at last - no takeoff or landing, but transits between inspections are still planned

djiHeadingMode.label: DJI Heading Mode
djiHeadingMode.hint: Controls how the drone aims its body during inspection passes when exporting to DJI WPML. Smooth body tracking interpolates body yaw between waypoints (recommended). Continuous POI tracking aims at the LHA across the whole arc (experimental - not yet hardware-confirmed). Snap at each waypoint rotates the body once per measurement (proven fallback).

capabilityNote.full: Carries all camera settings (white balance, ISO, shutter, focus, optical zoom) per inspection.
capabilityNote.zoomOnly: Carries optical zoom per inspection. Set ISO, shutter speed, white balance and focus mode on the controller before flight.
capabilityNote.nameDescOnly: KML carries waypoint name and description text only - no machine-readable camera settings. Set all camera values on the controller.
capabilityNote.none: No camera settings in this format - set all camera values on the controller. A full settings reference is included in the mission report PDF.

geozones.label: Include geozones in export
geozones.description: Bundle the airport's keep-out polygons (obstacles + active safety zones) into the export so the drone honors them at flight time.
geozones.runwayBuffersDescription: Adds runway and taxiway buffer polygons as inclusion fences in the QGroundControl .plan file.
geozones.runwayBuffersRequiresMavlink: Runway buffers require a MAVLink export.
geozones.advisoryNote: Advisory only in {{formats}} - DJI Pilot 2 renders the keep-out polygons but does NOT enforce them.

disabledReason.noFormatSelected: Select at least one export format first.
disabledReason.noCapableFormat: None of the selected formats can carry keep-out zones (MAVLink, JSON, UgCS, KML, KMZ).
disabledReason.droneNotSelected: Assign a drone profile to the mission first.
disabledReason.droneIncapable: The selected drone profile does not support geozone upload.

missionReport.title: Mission Technical Report
missionReport.description: Technical report with maps, altitude profile, and timeline

fieldHub.title: Field Hub connection
fieldHub.connectHint: In DJI Pilot 2, open Cloud Service and enter this address.
fieldHub.scanHint: Scan with the RC to open it
fieldHub.noHostHint: Set the hub's public host so Pilot 2 can connect.
fieldHub.offlineHint: Power the travel router and make sure the RC is on the hub Wi-Fi, then wait for Pilot 2 to reconnect.
fieldHub.caHint: Install on each RC once so Pilot 2 trusts the hub.

sendToDrone.title: Send to Drone
sendToDrone.description: Push the mission into DJI Pilot 2's route library over the field link
sendToDrone.success: Mission sent – it will appear in Pilot's route library
sendToDrone.error: Failed to send the mission to the drone
sendToDrone.clampWarning: Some altitudes were clamped to the takeoff reference. Review the altitude warning, then acknowledge to send.

uploadDroneMediaDialog.title: Upload Drone Media
uploadDroneMediaDialog.empty: No drone media received yet. Upload media from DJI Pilot 2 after landing.
uploadDroneMediaDialog.noInspections: This mission has no inspections yet. Add an inspection before uploading media.

measurementFlow.title: Measure PAPI lights
measurementFlow.confirmHint: Drag a box to reposition it, then confirm to run the analysis.
measurementFlow.noBoxes: No lights were detected automatically. You can still run the analysis.
measurementFlow.previewError: Could not load the first-frame preview.

missionList.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?

tools.placePoint: Place a point on the map (T)
tools.zoom: Left click zoom in, right click zoom out (Z)
tools.heading: Measure heading between two points (H)

help.title: Controls Help
help.clickSelectDblLocate: Click to select. Double-click to recenter the map on the object.

cameraPresets.title: Camera Presets
cameraPresets.name: Preset Name
cameraPresets.setDefault: Mark as default preset for this drone

terrain.title: Terrain Data
terrain.titleHelp: Source of ground elevation used to correct trajectory altitude. Flat assumes airport elevation everywhere; uploaded DEM or downloaded API data adds true terrain.
terrain.description: Configure ground elevation source for trajectory altitude correction
terrain.flatDescription: Uses constant airport elevation for all points
terrain.uploadDemDescription: Upload a GeoTIFF digital elevation model file
terrain.downloadApiDescription: Download elevation data from Open-Elevation API (5km radius)
terrain.coverageWarning: DEM does not cover airport location

rewriteExisting.label: Rewrite existing structures with new terrain
rewriteExisting.help: Rebuild LHA, obstacle, AGL, and mission takeoff/landing altitudes against the new ground. Default ON. Uncheck to keep existing altitudes intact (validated missions stay validated, but exported KMZs may mix old + new ground references).

airportList.searchPlaceholder: Search airports by ICAO code, name, or city

createAirport.title: Create New Airport
createAirport.icaoCodeHelp: Four-letter ICAO airport code (e.g. LZIB). Unique identifier; required for OpenAIP lookup and used as the primary key on the map.
createAirport.name: Name
createAirport.nameHelp: Display name shown in the airport list and map title. Free text; pick what operators will recognise.
createAirport.cityHelp: City closest to the airport. Optional - used for filtering in the airport list.
createAirport.countryHelp: Country the airport is in. Optional - used for filtering in the airport list.
createAirport.latitudeHelp: Latitude of the airport reference point in decimal degrees (-90 to 90). Use Pick on Map for the most accurate value.
createAirport.longitudeHelp: Longitude of the airport reference point in decimal degrees (-180 to 180). Use Pick on Map for the most accurate value.
createAirport.altitudeHelp: Elevation of the airport reference point above mean sea level. Used as the baseline for new infrastructure.
createAirport.icaoRequired: ICAO code is required (4 uppercase letters)
createAirport.icaoConflict: An airport with this ICAO code already exists
createAirport.importRadiusHint: Only obstacles and airspaces within this radius are imported
createAirport.importRadiusHelp: Search radius around the airport used by OpenAIP lookup. Only obstacles and airspaces within this distance are suggested. Range: 0.5-50 km.
createAirport.importRadiusInvalid: Radius must be between 0.5 and 50 km

lookup.notFound: No airport found for this ICAO code
lookup.apiDown: OpenAIP lookup is unavailable. You can still enter data manually.
lookup.noSuggestions: No runways, airspaces, or obstacles found near this airport
lookup.partialFailure: Airport created, but {{count}} suggested item(s) could not be added. You can add them manually from the airport detail page.

detail.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Discard changes?
detail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
detail.deleteAirportWarnMissions: All missions belonging to this airport will be deleted
detail.reverseNumberingHint: Flip the PAPI numbering A,B,C,D → D,C,B,A in one step. Each light keeps its position and angle; only the labels swap.
detail.surfaceHasAgl: AGL system "{{name}}" is connected to this surface and will also be deleted
detail.airportElevationHelp: Elevation of the airport reference point above mean sea level. Used as the baseline for altitudes and as the default for new infrastructure.
detail.noFeatureSelected: Select a feature on the map to edit
detail.surfaceIdentifierHelp: Short label shown on the map and in pickers (e.g. 'RWY 06/24', 'TWY Alpha'). Must be unique within the airport.
detail.surfaceTypeHelp: Whether the surface is a runway or a taxiway. Runways carry threshold and end positions; taxiways do not.
detail.surfaceHeadingHelp: True heading of the runway centerline in degrees (0 = north, 90 = east). Use the Opposite button to flip 180°.
detail.surfaceLengthHelp: Surface length along the centerline. Use Recalculate to refresh from the polygon geometry.
detail.surfaceWidthHelp: Surface width perpendicular to the centerline. Use Recalculate to refresh from the polygon geometry.
detail.touchpointHelp: Runway touchdown point. Anchors the threshold for distance-from-threshold measurements; pick on the map for accuracy.
detail.thresholdEndHelp: Approach and departure ends of the runway centerline. Used to compute distance-from-threshold for AGLs, align inspections, and drive reverse-runway pair-swap. Use Swap if the threshold and endpoint were saved in the wrong order.
detail.swapThresholdEndHelp: Swap the threshold and end positions. Useful when the runway was created with the threshold and endpoint reversed.
detail.noPosition: Not set - use Pick on Map to place
detail.obstacleNameHelp: Display name shown on the map and in the obstacle list. Free text; pick something operators will recognise.
detail.obstacleTypeHelp: Category of the obstacle (building, antenna, vegetation, tower, other). Drives the icon used on the map.
detail.obstacleHeightHelp: Height of the obstacle above the ground. Used by clearance checks during trajectory validation.
detail.bufferDistanceHelp: No-go ring drawn around the feature. Trajectories must stay outside this distance; larger values are safer but reduce coverage.
detail.zoneNameHelp: Display name for the safety zone. Shown in the map legend and in validation messages.
detail.zoneTypeHelp: Safety-zone classification (CTR, Restricted, Prohibited, Temporary No-Fly). Determines how the validator treats incursions.
detail.zoneFloorHelp: Lower altitude limit (MSL) of the zone. Below this height the zone has no effect.
detail.zoneCeilingHelp: Upper altitude limit (MSL) of the zone. Above this height the zone has no effect. Leave empty for unlimited.
detail.zoneActiveHelp: Inactive zones are stored but ignored by validation - useful for temporary zones that can be toggled without deleting them.
detail.aglNameHelp: Display name for the AGL system (e.g. 'PAPI RWY 24L'). Auto-derived from the surface and type, override only if needed.
detail.aglSurfaceHelp: Runway or taxiway this AGL system belongs to. Used by inspection methods that need a centerline reference.
detail.aglTypeHelp: PAPI provides a defined approach beam with setting angles per LHA; runway edge lights are continuous markers without a glide slope.
detail.aglSideHelp: Side of the runway the AGL sits on (Left or Right) when looking from the threshold. Determines on-screen placement and the trajectory's standoff side.
detail.aglGlideAngleHelp: Nominal approach beam angle of the PAPI in degrees (typical 3.0°). PAPI-only - edge lights have no defined glide slope.
detail.aglDistanceHelp: Distance from the runway threshold to the AGL position along the centerline. Used to render the approach beam.
detail.lhaUnitDesignatorHelp: Identifier for this LHA. PAPI uses A-D (closest-to-runway = D); edge lights use sequence numbers. Changing this on PAPI also reorders sibling units.
detail.lhaSettingAngleHelp: Angle the LHA's beam is set to in degrees. Drives the observation angle used by Horizontal Range and Vertical Profile.
detail.lhaToleranceHelp: Half-width of the acceptable angular band around the setting angle. Used by safety validation to flag out-of-band waypoints.
detail.lhaLampTypeHelp: Light source used in the LHA (Halogen or LED). Documented for maintenance; does not affect trajectory.
detail.lhaLensMslHelp: PAPI lens height above mean sea level, taken from the photo's absolute altitude. PAPI units only.
detail.lhaLensAglHelp: PAPI lens height above ground level (MSL minus terrain elevation). Requires DEM coverage; otherwise enter manually. PAPI units only.
detail.recalculateDescription: Recompute length, width, and heading from polygon geometry

surfacePair.title: Pair Link
surfacePair.help: Couple two reciprocal runway directions so geometry edits propagate to both sides; identifier and AGLs stay per-direction.
surfacePair.createReverseHelp: Create the reciprocal direction with reversed centerline and swapped threshold/end, and auto-couple.
surfacePair.pairWithHelp: Couple this surface with another uncoupled RUNWAY in the same airport.
surfacePair.decoupleHelp: Clear the pair link on both sides; geometry stays as-is and future edits stop propagating.
surfacePair.noPairCandidates: No uncoupled RUNWAY surfaces are available in this airport.
surfacePair.overwriteWarning: The other side's geometry will be overwritten with the primary side's centerline (reversed) and boundary. Direction-specific fields (identifier, threshold/end, touchpoint, AGLs) stay on each side.
surfacePair.deletePairWarning: Deleting a coupled surface also deletes the paired surface "{{identifier}}" and {{count}} AGL system(s) on both directions. Decouple first if you only want to delete this side.
surfacePair.renameWhileCoupledError: Decouple the surface before renaming it.

agl.lhaSpacingHelp: Distance between consecutive LHAs along the line. The bulk generator places units evenly between the first and last positions at this spacing.
agl.quickSetupInvalidPositions: Enter valid coordinates for both positions
agl.quickSetupInvalidSpacing: Spacing must be a positive number

creation.title: Create Feature
creation.selectCategoryHelp: Top-level category for the feature you just drew (Ground Surface, Safety Zone, Obstacle, AGL, LHA). Drives which subtype and fields appear below.
creation.selectTypeHelp: Subtype within the chosen category (e.g. Runway vs Taxiway, or specific safety-zone class). Cannot be changed once the feature is created.
creation.parentAglHelp: AGL system this LHA belongs to. The unit designator and lamp settings inherit defaults from the most recent sibling on the same AGL.
creation.heading: Heading (°)
creation.headingHelp: True heading of the runway/taxiway centerline in degrees (0 = north, 90 = east). Use Opposite to flip 180° if you drew the polygon backwards.
creation.lengthHelp: Surface length along the centerline. Pre-filled from the polygon you drew - adjust if needed.
creation.widthHelp: Surface width perpendicular to the centerline. Pre-filled from the polygon you drew - adjust if needed.
creation.altitudeFloorHelp: Lower altitude limit (MSL) of the safety zone. Below this height the zone is ignored. Defaults to airport elevation.
creation.altitudeCeilingHelp: Upper altitude limit (MSL) of the safety zone. Above this height the zone is ignored. Leave empty for unlimited.
creation.activeHelp: Inactive zones are stored but ignored by validation - useful for temporary zones you can toggle without deleting.
creation.obstacleTypeHelp: Category of the obstacle (building, antenna, vegetation, tower, other). Drives the icon used on the map.
creation.obstacleHeightHelp: Height of the obstacle above the ground. Used by clearance checks during trajectory validation.
creation.bufferDistanceHelp: No-go ring drawn around the feature. Trajectories must stay outside this distance; larger values are safer but reduce coverage.
creation.aglTypeHelp: PAPI provides a defined approach beam with setting angles per LHA; runway edge lights are continuous markers without a glide slope.
creation.aglSideHelp: Side of the runway the AGL sits on (Left or Right) when looking from the threshold. Determines on-screen placement and the trajectory's standoff side.
creation.glideSlopeAngleHelp: Nominal approach beam angle of the PAPI in degrees (typical 3.0°). PAPI-only - edge lights have no defined glide slope.
creation.distanceFromThresholdHelp: Distance from the runway threshold to the AGL position along the centerline. Used to render the approach beam.
creation.surfaceHelp: Runway or taxiway this AGL system belongs to. Required - AGLs must be linked to a surface.
creation.thresholdEndHelp: Pick which drawn endpoint is the runway threshold. Defaults to the first drawn vertex; swap to flip. Used by downstream features like PAPI distance-from-threshold and reverse-runway pair-swap.
creation.noRunwayWarning: Create a runway first - AGLs must be linked to a runway surface
creation.altitudeHelp: Ground elevation at this point in metres MSL. Auto-filled from terrain data; edit to override.

imageExtractor.title: Extract Positions from Photos
imageExtractor.dropHint: Drop drone photos here, or choose files. GPS position is read from each image.
imageExtractor.extractError: Could not extract metadata from the selected images.
imageExtractor.noAccess: You don't have access to this airport. Ask a super admin to assign it to your account.
imageExtractor.noGps: No GPS position found in this image.
imageExtractor.noDem: No terrain data: AGL lens height must be entered manually.
imageExtractor.noPoints: None of the uploaded images carry a GPS position.

coordinatePicker.title: Pick Location
coordinatePicker.instructions: Click on the map to set coordinates

inspections.title: Inspection Templates
inspections.noMatch: No inspection templates match your filters
inspections.selectAglSystemHelp: AGL system this template targets. Determines which inspection methods are valid and which LHAs are available below.
inspections.lhaUnitsHelp: Pick which LHAs of the AGL this template inspects. Selection drives the centre point and the per-LHA setting angles used downstream.
inspections.methodHelp: Inspection method enforced by this template. Only methods compatible with the selected AGL type are listed.
inspections.altitudeOffsetHelp: Default vertical bias applied to every measurement waypoint. Operators can override per inspection.
inspections.measurementSpeedOverrideHelp: Default measurement-pass speed for inspections built from this template. Leave empty to inherit from the mission. Speeds above the camera frame-rate limit will warn.
inspections.measurementDensityHelp: Default number of waypoints sampled along the measurement pass. Higher density captures more data but lengthens the flight.
inspections.customTolerancesHelp: Default angular-tolerance band (degrees) used by safety validation for inspections of this template.
inspections.hoverDurationHelp: Default time the drone holds at each measurement waypoint before moving on. Longer hover gives sensors more time to settle.
inspections.deleteConfirm: Delete inspection template {{name}}? Missions using this template will keep their current configuration but cannot regenerate.
inspections.bulkCreateDesc: Generate templates for all valid AGL system and method combinations. Existing combinations will be skipped.
inspections.bulkCreateNone: All valid combinations already have templates
inspections.selectAirportFirst: Select an airport to manage inspection templates
inspections.noAglSystems: No AGL systems at this airport

delete.title: Delete Drone Profile
delete.confirm: Delete drone profile "{{name}}"? Missions using this profile will keep their current configuration.

detail.noMissions: No missions use this drone profile

airport.title: Airport
airport.aglSystemsHelp: Approach Guidance Light systems at this airport (PAPI beams or runway-edge-light strips). Each AGL groups one or more LHAs that inspections can target.

lha.sequenceNumberHelp: Order of this LHA along the line, starting at 1. Reordering shifts siblings on the same AGL.
lha.sequenceOutOfRange: Sequence number must be between 1 and {{max}}

operatorDrones.title: Drone Profiles
operatorDrones.contactCoordinator: Contact your Coordinator to modify drone specifications
operatorDrones.bulkChangeConfirm: Change drone for {{count}} missions from {{from}} to {{to}}?
operatorDrones.allDraftDesc: Change drone for all DRAFT missions at this airport
operatorDrones.draftCount: {{count}} missions in DRAFT status will be updated

superAdmin.usersPlaceholder: User management will be available here
superAdmin.airportsPlaceholder: Airport assignment will be available here
superAdmin.systemPlaceholder: System settings will be available here

admin.title: Administration
admin.deactivateConfirm: Are you sure you want to deactivate {{name}}?
admin.deleteUserConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{name}}? This cannot be undone.
admin.revokeAccessConfirm: Are you sure you want to deactivate {{name}}? They will lose access to the system.
admin.maintenanceDescription: When enabled, only Super Admin users can access the system.

elevationApiFallback.label: Per-point elevation API fallback
elevationApiFallback.help: When ON, FLAT airports query Open-Elevation per point so trajectories follow terrain even without a DEM. Costs extra latency and depends on the external API being reachable; OFF falls back to the constant airport elevation.

elevationApi.providerHelp: Backend used to resolve per-point ground elevation when LHA placement opts in.
elevationApi.apiKeyHelp: Sent only to the configured provider. Stored encrypted at rest; the existing key is shown masked.
elevationApi.apiKeyPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the stored key
elevationApi.apiKeyClearHint: Type "clear" then save to remove the stored key.
elevationApi.warning: Used only when placing LHA positions. Open-Elevation is slow and may fail under load; consider a paid provider before production traffic.

admin.searchUsers: Search users by name or email...
admin.searchAuditLog: Search by user, action, or entity...
admin.name: Name

airportDetail.orphanedHint: Coordinators and operators can't see or use this airport until a coordinator is assigned below.
airportDetail.noCoordinatorNote: Assign a coordinator so this airport is visible to coordinators and operators.

errors.webglUnsupportedHint: This application requires WebGL to render maps and 3D views. Please use a modern browser with hardware acceleration enabled.

measurementsList.title: Measurements
measurementsList.searchPlaceholder: Search results by mission or method...
measurementsList.empty: No measurements yet for this airport. Start one from the drone media upload.
measurementsList.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This permanently removes the run and its results.
measurementsList.renamePlaceholder: Enter a name (leave blank to use the inspection label)

results.notReady: This measurement has not finished processing yet. Results will appear here once the run is done.
results.noMeasurements: No measurements yet for this mission. Start one from Validation & Export.
results.pickInspection: Select a measured inspection to view its results.

sections.horizontalEmpty: Horizontal analysis lands in a follow-up update.

explain.angle: Each light's measured elevation angle per frame. The shaded bands mark the red-to-white transition range; the dashed line is the detected transition midpoint.
explain.intensity: Measured brightness of each light per frame, with the elevation angle overlaid on the right axis so you can read intensity against where the drone was looking.
explain.chromaticity: The red fraction of each light's colour, r / (r+g+b). The right-axis overlay shows the elevation angle at the same moment.
explain.perLightRgb: Raw red, green and blue channel values (0-255) for the selected unit, with elevation angle on the right. The shaded band and dashed line mark the nominal transition angle.
explain.perLightChroma: Normalized red, green and blue chromaticity for the selected unit. The dashed white line at 1/3 is the neutral white point; the right axis carries the elevation angle.
explain.redChroma: Red chromaticity for all four units against elevation angle - how the colour shifts as the drone climbs through each unit's beam.
explain.luminosity: Measured brightness for all four units against elevation angle.
explain.colorDiff: Red minus green chromaticity - a single colour-balance number per frame. Crossing zero marks the colour transition.
explain.lightArea: Detected light blob area in pixels for each unit - a proxy for apparent size and bloom.
explain.hRedChroma: Red chromaticity plotted against horizontal angle. The centerline at 0° is straight ahead of the unit.
explain.hLuminosity: Brightness plotted against horizontal angle, showing how each unit falls off to the sides of its aim.
explain.lightDirection: The horizontal angle at which each unit was brightest - the direction it is effectively aimed.

heightProfile.title: Drone height profile
heightProfile.explanation: Shows the drone's WGS84 elevation over time and its altitude difference to each PAPI light and the touch point.

cloudMissions.title: Cloud Missions
cloudMissions.empty: No cloud missions on the field hub.
cloudMissions.deleteConfirm: Delete cloud mission "{{name}}"? This removes it from the field hub.

linkProcess.help: The measurement processes all videos currently assigned to the chosen inspection, in order. Assign every video for that inspection before starting.
linkProcess.noAirport: Select an airport to link this video to one of its missions.
linkProcess.error: Could not link and start the measurement.
